task_description: Full UI polish across all views of the Kiro Kantoku macOS app to make it a stunning, elegant, and refined desktop experience. Key areas: consistent design tokens, properly sized buttons, intuitive text inputs, approachable colors, well-proportioned popups, visually cohesive elements with no mismatched curved/straight edges.

verification.summary: swift build succeeds (0 errors). swift test passes all 220 tests with 0 failures. No new tests were added (this is a UI polish task with no behavior changes - all changes are purely visual styling). All changes are verified to compile correctly across 30+ view files.
